title: glechoma schtschurowskiana
intro: Glechoma schtschurowskiana, also known as Russian melilot or creeping thyme, is a perennial herb native to Central Asia. This plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects, making it a popular remedy for digestive issues and respiratory problems. The health benefits of Glechoma schtschurowskiana include its ability to soothe digestive issues, reduce inflammation, and improve respiratory function. Herbal preparations of Glechoma schtschurowskiana can be made into teas, infusions, or tinctures, and are often used to treat conditions such as bloating, indigestion, and bronchitis.
